EmailTemplate.description: Confirmation that underwriter is covering the last 2 payments of policy.
EmailTemplate.name: Premium Support - Last 2 Payments
EmailTemplate.subject: Premium Support Last 2 Payments
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for contacting Kingsbridge.
Please accept this email as confirmation that we have applied the discounted premium to your account.
To confirm, our underwriters have agreed to cover the final 2 instalments of your policy. This means that you don't owe any premiums going forward, but your policy will not expire until DD/MM/YYYY.
Please contact us on 01242 808 740 if you have any further queries.
Kind Regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Accounts Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
